name: Datarails
tagline: AI-powered FP&A platform built on Excel for budgeting, forecasting, and reporting
description: Datarails is an FP&A platform built on Excel that automates data consolidation, forecasting, budgeting, and real-time reporting with AI-powered capabilities. It features automated anomaly detection, audit trails, and compliance certifications. The platform lets finance teams keep working in Excel while adding AI-powered analysis and collaboration.
